query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_customers,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN customerType = 'invoice' THEN 1 END) as invoice_customers,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN customerType = 'estimate' THEN 1 END) as estimate_customers,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN segment = 'recent' THEN 1 END) as recent,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN segment = 'lapsed' THEN 1 END) as lapsed,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN segment = 'unknown' THEN 1 END) as unknown_seg
FROM customers;
